title: 08-3-0 Linruo Zhao - Introduction to Session 3
text: NRC-IAGT Collaborative Forum Agenda: • Prakash Patnaik • Henry Bernstein • Coffee Break • Xiao Haung • Ashok Koul • Open Panel Discussion 21 Oct. 2008, Ottawa Session 3: Gas Turbine Material and Component Lifing • Development of new material and processes • Reliable life prediction method • In-situ monitoring • Self-healing coating system
